title: Flick n Goal
description: Get ready for an electrifying soccer experience with Flick n Goal! Choose your team from a diverse roster of countries and dive into the action-packed world of international football. Strategically place your players, set your formation, and unleash your tactical prowess as you compete in thrilling matches. Whether youre a seasoned soccer aficionado or a casual gamer, Flick n Goal offers excitement for all levels of players. With intuitive controls and dynamic gameplay, every match is a pulse-pounding adventure from kickoff to final whistle.
instructions: Mouse drag and release to hit ball and move players
